meaning: n.[核]强子(参与强相互作用的基本粒子,包括介子和重子两大类)
examples: The first protons were circulated around the Large Hadron Collider.
Today we’ll have a look at a hadron collider of the Nuclear Physics Institute in Novosibirsk.
